text: A pedestrian may not move in front of, under, between, or through the cars of a moving or stationary train occupying any part of a railroad grade crossing.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 552. Pedestrians
##### § 552.011 — Train Occupying Crossing

A pedestrian may not move in front of, under, between, or through the cars of a moving or stationary train occupying any part of a railroad grade crossing.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1247 (H.B.2775), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*
